name: Service tile
visual: Bordered or shadowed cell: icon (top-center or top-left) + title + 1-line summary + optional check-list + arrow link; CH digital variants add an inline 'ab CHF X' price line.
placement: Within the services grid — 2/3/4 across. Icon anchors the top; the arrow link/price sits at the bottom edge; the whole tile is commonly clickable.
states: Hover: border→accent (sharp looks) OR lift+shadow (soft looks); arrow nudges; icon tints.
animation: Staggered grid reveal; hover = lift+shadow (soft) or border→accent (swiss/editorial/warm) 200–300ms; icon tint + arrow nudge.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: 3-col, icon top, flat, clickable
Nexova: price line on each tile

designLanguage.editorial: Sharp hairline cell, icon-in-box, uppercase title.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded-2xl, soft shadow, hover-lift, vibrant icon.
designLanguage.warm: Sharp hairline tile on paper, ink arrow.
